title: Suspicion Makes Secure.
content:
He that will live of all cares dispossess'd,
    Must shun the bad, aye, and suspect the best.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Suspicion Makes Secure."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
